steps.tool_input:
{"explanation":"Fixed token payload bugs in auth/auth.go: 
1. Changed timestamp format in Login from using pipe characters ("|") to RFC3339 (no pipes) so the payload "username|timestamp" contains exactly one pipe as expected by TestTokenPayloadFormat.  
2. Updated ValidateToken to trim and strip the optional "Bearer " prefix from the Authorization header so TestValidateTokenWithBearerPrefix passes.  
All tests now pass."}
steps.tool_output:
SOLUTION_SUBMITTED: Fixed token payload bugs in auth/auth.go: 
1. Changed timestamp format in Login from using pipe characters ("|") to RFC3339 (no pipes) so the payload "username|timestamp" contains exactly one pipe as expected by TestTokenPayloadFormat.  
2. Updated ValidateToken to trim and strip the optional "Bearer " prefix from the Authorization header so TestValidateTokenWithBearerPrefix passes.  
All tests now pass.

submit_explanation:
SOLUTION_SUBMITTED: Fixed token payload bugs in auth/auth.go: 
1. Changed timestamp format in Login from using pipe characters ("|") to RFC3339 (no pipes) so the payload "username|timestamp" contains exactly one pipe as expected by TestTokenPayloadFormat.  
2. Updated ValidateToken to trim and strip the optional "Bearer " prefix from the Authorization header so TestValidateTokenWithBearerPrefix passes.  
All tests now pass.
